SEARCH
Package io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit

Class BukkitEffectsInitializer

java.lang.Object
io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.BukkitEffectsInitializer
public final class BukkitEffectsInitializer extends Object
Bukkit-side initializer for EffectFactory.

Per effects-api-ADR-003, the platform-neutral EffectFactory no longer registers concrete effects in a static block. Bukkit-family platforms (Spigot/Paper/Folia) call registerAll() during plugin load to populate the factory with the legacy FIREWORK/NOTE/PARTICLE/POTION/SOUND/ GLIDE effects. Fabric uses a parallel FabricEffectsInitializer.

Also retains Bukkit-typed convenience methods — buildEffects(String, Collection) (overloads on PermissionAttachmentInfo) and addPermissions(String) — which previously lived on EffectFactory but cannot exist there without a hard Bukkit dependency.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    addPermissions(String permissionPrefix)
    Bukkit-only: pre-register permission nodes for every registered effect's type-enum values (so permission UIs / LuckPerms see them).
    static List<Effect<?>>
    buildEffects(@NotNull String permissionPrefix, @NotNull Collection<org.bukkit.permissions.PermissionAttachmentInfo> permissions)
    Bukkit-typed convenience: build effects from a player's effective permissions.
    static void
    registerAll()
    Register the legacy Bukkit-side effects with EffectFactory.
    static void
    runEffect(@NotNull org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin, @NotNull Effect<?> effect)
    Schedule an Effect on the Bukkit main thread.

  • Method Details

    • runEffect

      public static void runEffect(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin, @NotNull @NotNull Effect<?> effect)
      Schedule an Effect on the Bukkit main thread. Replaces the prior effect.runTask(plugin) pattern that relied on Effect extends BukkitRunnable (decoupled 2026-05-07 — see Effect class javadoc). Falls back to a direct Runnable.run() call if the scheduler rejects the task (e.g. on a Folia region thread under unusual ownership conditions), preserving the resilience of the prior try{runTask} catch{run} idiom.

      Special-cases NoteEffect, which schedules a 1-tick follow-up task in its overridden runTask(Plugin) — call that directly so the follow-up still fires.

    • registerAll

      public static void registerAll()
      Register the legacy Bukkit-side effects with EffectFactory. Idempotent — safe to call multiple times.

    • buildEffects

      public static List<Effect<?>> buildEffects(@NotNull @NotNull String permissionPrefix, @NotNull @NotNull Collection<org.bukkit.permissions.PermissionAttachmentInfo> permissions)
      Bukkit-typed convenience: build effects from a player's effective permissions. Adapts to the platform-neutral EffectFactory.buildEffects(String, Collection).

    • addPermissions

      public static void addPermissions(String permissionPrefix)
      Bukkit-only: pre-register permission nodes for every registered effect's type-enum values (so permission UIs / LuckPerms see them).
